transcript:
CALLER: Uh, hello, I want to book a, uh, dermatology appointment. My skin has been breaking out really badly.
AGENT: Of course! We have Dr. Kavitha Rao in our dermatology department. She's available this Wednesday at 4 PM or next Monday at 11 AM. Any preference?
CALLER: Wednesday 4 PM, yeah that works.
AGENT: Great. Can I have your full name and mobile number?
CALLER: Neha Gupta. And my number is 7890123456.
AGENT: Perfect. Appointment confirmed for Ms. Neha Gupta with Dr. Kavitha Rao this Wednesday at 4 PM. Please carry a valid ID. Is there anything else I can help you with?
CALLER: No that's all. Thank you!
AGENT: You're welcome. See you Wednesday!
